case_title: CACH, LLC VS. DIEM DANH et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DANH, DIEM AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-06-2014
DECLARATION PRUSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANH, DIEM AN INDIVIDUAL $5,189.63 PRINCIPAL, $850.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,324.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
